title: Fragment with JSON extraction
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_by_metadata/1` that takes a metadata key string and returns posts where a PostgreSQL JSONB `metadata` column contains that key. Use `fragment("? \\? ?", p.metadata, ^key)` — the `\?` is how you escape `?` in an Ecto fragment to avoid it being treated as a placeholder. Pin the key. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`. (Assume a `metadata` jsonb field exists on Post for the purpose of this challenge.)
tier_rationale: JSON fragment with escaped `?` and a pinned value. Moderate because the escape mechanism is non-obvious.
